title: Write a reference doc listing which tests CAN be async
prompt: Write `docs/async_rules.md` listing which kinds of tests are safe to mark `async: true` and which must be `async: false`. The doc must state: (1) tests with exclusive sandbox connections (allow/3) can be async, (2) tests that use `mode(:shared)` must be `async: false`, (3) tests that write to `Application.put_env/3` or ETS must be `async: false`.
tier_rationale: Reference-doc writing. Sonnet produces this reliably when given the exact list of points to cover.
research_citation: "If a test sets the Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox to :shared mode, never run it asynchronously" — AppSignal: 8 Common Causes of Flaky Tests
